role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil, and vegetation as requested.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant morphology (Acacia types) and biome.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road markings and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Used camera generation quality and building styles to narrow candidates.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the region (Sub-Saharan Africa) and the general landscape features. However, the regulatory and meta agents incorrectly prioritized Botswana over the ground truth (South Africa) based on road markings and camera generation quality, leading to a wrong final prediction.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described savanna, red soil, and acacia trees.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described yellow edge lines and white center lines.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described the makeshift structure and road surface.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: South Africa was not included in the candidate pool for the country round.
